LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD - JUDGE MILLER IS RECUSED. PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 303 BEFORE JUDGE KRAMER. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND CONTACT THE CLERK AT (415) 551-3726 TO SET THE HEARING DATE. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award - Judge Miller is recused. Per order of the Presiding Judge, to be heard in Department 303 before Judge Kramer. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk at (415) 551-3726 to set the hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
